item.title: A family of Xolos, one of the most ancient dog breeds in the world, originally from what is now Mexico. Native Americans, they were guardians of the night and the underworld, protectors against evil spirits, and guides of mortals during difficult times.
item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Wonderful and weird nature (and cat tax)
item.description:
Visualisation of the importance of selfie angles.
This is so adorably cute. Just look at the little awkward square.
The beetle equivalent of the nursing home throwing a party for the 100 year old resident.
Cute chick lounging on her tank.
Let's get some selective breeding on these mf's to make them bigger.
Mother Nature when the atoll is submerged: "Damn, I forgot to make a backup copy on the mainland. Now I have to make these from scratch again."
Oh, my god. It's full of stars.
"If I seen any bird eggs? No, why are you asking me? That's specieist of you. I'm being herpetologically profiled!"
A speck o' gecko.
Cat tax Miss Charlotta: "A new bathroom rug?! Just for me?!" No, Charlie. It's for standing on after show– "Just for me! How thoughtful! I'm gonna use it to clean my paws from litter."
item.dc:creator: Kittensandyarns

item.title: Yup
item.description: That's accurate and wonderful, but if you only do that, thinking it's sufficient, and withhold affection and intimacy then you're gonna have a bad time.
item.dc:creator: TypicallyMisjudged

item.title: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle!
item.dc:creator: jezebel2718

item.title: Do good dump
item.description:
Like the 40 hours. Like what happened humanity? How’d we fuck this up so bad?
Yep
Capitalism and business. There’s a profit to be turned in all things. Even in death and decay.
This is the kind of pun that I like best.
The telltale project
No notes
May it last 333 1/3rd years!!!
It is wholly unethical to hoard bread for any reason other than to feed a lot of people in the next day or two.
Buttholes… the lot of them!!!
lol
Yeah!!! Wait… is this a state of fact? Or an insult?
Only one bus allowed
Though this is a different story overseas. Both problems could be solved if the US respected their funds from their military to healthcare, but…
Yeah not down with that at all.
I can’t think of a purpose more noble.
This makes me hot
Noted.
I woke up after surgery with my hand in a mitten tied to the side of the bed. Like I wasn’t good enough to have fingered gloves.
Tragedy in three acts
Not just colonialism but war and oppression in general. The level of human cruelty has always been the same, I think. It’s just the delivery of the damage and the news is spread that much faster.
I want to be that kind, I want that kind of kindness upon me. The world can use a lot more of kindness I think. Empathy is what helps us progress forward together as a species. We lose sight of that at times.
Always be true and have no time for anyone who won’t let you be your genuine self
All the good that every one of us can do. I see you out there helping others, giving pizza and what not. It gives me hope.
Some days you’re the one despairing, other days, you’re the sandwich ignored on the floor.
I think everyone knows this to be true on some level. They just don’t want to speak out just in case they get rich.
I love this. Romans with their butterfingers…
From this day on.
Have sex with her again and he’ll be gone.
It has for me since my teens though.
“Uppies!”
Need all that soggy trauma off me.
Cat tax: Mona. Also, there’s an organization called the “Splinter Collective” out in Tucson AZ that does a lot of good work for marginalized people and communities. Check out their website here: https://splintercollective.org/. And their YouTube page: https://m.youtube.com/@SplinterCollective. Be well everyone
I love it when you talk nerdy to me.
Now that we’ve entered December, I think a counterattack from Thanksgiving is in order. Maybe NNN?
Retirement has me on a limited income. We have to reuse the depends.
Are you mad at me?
I’m waiting…?!?!
Let’s get this straight people.
But those turtles were NINJA!!!
This makes me hot. And hurt. At the same time.
Yeah!!!
I want it and I want it NOW!!!
Furreals
Me play joke. Be put peepee in your coke.
It totally is. So is believing in the lot of them.
The Baggins side speaks louder to me. Especially the older I get.
“Call me Janet.”
I’m tired of waiting.
Random dickbutt in the wild!
Despite them? It’s a feature, not a bug.
item.dc:creator: grapekoolaid

item.title: My Mom crossed the rainbow bridge November 9th.
item.description:
She was so talented with crochet and cross-stitch.
Our family misses her so much. This has been the hardest loss.
She was a lovely person.
item.dc:creator: frageeelay

item.title: motion capture art over 9000
item.dc:creator: SpaceBarTender

item.title: Presents saved, porch pirates arrested
item.description:
STORY TIME A few days ago somebody from a Facebook group from my Montreal borough (Thrive NDG) posted about witnessing what they thought was porch pirate thievery. It came to my attention and realized it was my packages they were talking about. Turns out my packages I ordered from Amazon were stolen from my front porch. I was annoyed and sad but what can I do? Well, somebody else also saw this go down and, unbeknownst to me, reported it to the police as it was happening! At 6:30am the next morning the police showed up at my door informing me that not only did they catch and arrest the bad guys but they also fully recovered my stuff. They came early in the morning because they read in the FB group that I said I was needing some of that stuff for that day! ? It’s a freakin’ Christmas/Chanukah miracle!! ? I can’t thank my community enough. Thanks to the people who posted and those who reached out to me and the person who called 911 as it was happening that led the police right to them. Thanks to Station 9 in Montreal for doing the work they did and being absolutely amazing!
CTV Montreal News caught wind of this and covered the story. You can check that out here: https://montreal.ctvnews.ca/porch-pirate-arrested-montreal-man-gets-stolen-deliveries-returned-1.7130842 #porchpirates #christmas #montreal
item.dc:creator: Nerdcolony

item.title: Witchy Wednesday #5 (Mature)
item.description:
Artist: Albert Joseph Pénot Had a few posts deleted this weekend and got a 24 hour suspension, so I should be careful, but this is 100+ year old classical/fine art so it has it's own set of rules, right? Still Marked Mature just in case!
Artist: Albert Joseph Pénot
Artist: Albert Joseph Pénot

item.title: Another tools dump that may be useful, or just you wanna buy them
item.description:
Drill brush for car mat cleaning
I dont know why but i need this -:- Well in fact I know why
3 : Connecting giant chain
4 : Handicap car assistant. Technology is so cool.
5 : Masking Film and Tape Dispenser -:- Finally the one I needed
7 : Removing varnish from church pew with laser gun -::- I didn't even knew this existed
The Chalking Finger -::- Yeah how could we live without this
9 : These Wireless switches
Wrapping this Mercedes-Benz G63 AMG
11 : The future of road rage
12 : the absolute measure
12 : When you have lot of windows
13 : This game-changing nut splitter

Angel Shubel Happy Tuesday ya'll. I hope my fellow Americans are enjoying thier cold turkey and mayo sandwiches. Thank you for last week! 106th ed.
Kissy Duerré
Moxie Doll
Kissy Duerré
Kiley May
Angel Schubel
Danielle Briski
Kissy again
kiwitransgirl
To all my beautiful sisters out there: out, not-out, passing, non passing, non binary, can't be bothered to GAF - You are perfect, it is the hateful DBs that are wrong.
